feed.title: SAP Community - SAP Extended Warehouse Management
feed.subtitle: SAP Extended Warehouse Management Q&A in SAP Community

entry.title: Different delivery types DIG DOG not possible in one document in MIGO
entry.content:
Hi

We have created Work Order in IW31 for Refurbishment Process. Then While Posting Goods Issue in MIGO with 261 Movement Type and Getting error.

Different delivery types DIG DOG not possible in one document.

entry.title: bin division/separation without HUs?
entry.content:
hello,

is it possible to have a bin divided into a specific number of sections without using the HU concept (like Storage Behavior: Pallets, storage bin type depth)? Storage type should only be allowed for products being stored without HUs.

Thank you.

Regards

PAT

entry.title: \/SCWM/TO_CREATE OVER PICKING
entry.content:
We developed a PDA program that picks using CALL FUNCTION /SCWM/TO_CREATE.
However, OVER PICKING sometimes occurs.
Can you make sure that it doesn"t happen?

  DATA lt_create_exc TYPE /scwm/tt_conf_exc.

  IF ls_item-fr_huident NE ls_item-to_huident
    AND ls_item-to_huident IS NOT INITIAL.

    APPEND INITIAL LINE TO lt_create_exc ASSIGNING FIELD-SYMBOL(<fs_create_exc>).
    <fs_create_exc>-exccode   = 'CHHU'.
    <fs_create_exc>-buscon    = 'TPI'.
    <fs_create_exc>-exec_step = '02'.
  ENDIF.


  DATA: lt_ltap_vb  TYPE /scwm/tt_ltap_vb,
        lt_bapiret  TYPE bapirettab,
        lv_severity TYPE bapi_mtype.

  SET UPDATE TASK LOCAL.
  CALL FUNCTION '/SCWM/TO_CREATE'
    EXPORTING
      iv_lgnum       = ls_item-lgnum
      iv_update_task = abap_off
      iv_commit_work = abap_off      
      iv_wtcode      = space  
      it_create      = lt_create
      it_create_exc  = lt_create_exc
    IMPORTING
      et_ltap_vb     = lt_ltap_vb
      et_bapiret     = lt_bapiret
      ev_severity    = lv_severity.

entry.title: Unable to assign packaging material type
entry.content:
I created a packaging material using MM01 and selected material type as VERP packaging however, when I'm packing other material in PRDI the system is showing error while giving the packaging material as PKG. Error: PKG is not a packaging material. Please enter a valid packaging material. I also extended the material to EWM using MAT1

The above one is the material created by me. Check the packaging material data.



This is material created by someone else. Packaging material type is populated in this.

Please help, due to this I'm unable to pack the inbound/outbound delivery items in HUs.

@SAPSupport @narayanan_kchandran @Ilina

entry.title: Duplicate stock exits in QI stock same as Unrestricted stock after UD is completed
entry.content:
Dear Gurus,

We need your help in one of the issue/ issues:

The UD was completed and the stock is in Unrestricted, but there the whole problem starts, to add the surprise, the same stock is present in QI as well. There is no pending UI. We checked in EWM via ERP stock check and we found that there is no stock in EWM. And we also saw in material documents that were posted, and saw 712 Mvt was posted (which seems to be trial for tock reconciliation).

entry.title: Im trying to distribute OD to my warehouse but its getting stuck in SM2
entry.content:
Hi Experts,

Im trying to process a outbound delivery through Standard Sales Order. Once delivery is created it is stuck in queue with the below error I have tried what was suggested in previous blog below is the snippet of recommended changes done please guide me to solve the error.I have checked the Document type/Item Type setting it is working for my other warehouse but not for this.

https://community.sap.com/t5/supply-chain-management-q-a/getting-error-quot-could-not-create-header-data-delivery-0080000471-system/qaq-p/12545425/comment-id/186959

This blog suggested the below config changes but i have changed it but there is still error in SMQ2

entry.title: Bin sorting in EWM
entry.content: Hi guys, Does bin sorting in EWM has any significance for picking and put away activities. Because putaway happens in bin naming sequence or as per sorting with Crossline put away sorting. And picking happens as per stock removal rule such as FIFO or LIFO. Then what is significance of sorting for putaway and picking?

entry.title: Kitting to Stock EWM - error in method /scwm/cl_vas_model
entry.content:
when running a cycle kit to stock with vas in ewm when i press on post kits after post components it shows me this error and i can`t find product 

and there is my packaging specification

entry.title: Issue in Refurbishment Process with EWM while Goods Issue for Damage material
entry.content:
Hi,

We are currently implementing the refurbishment process using SAP EWM and have encountered an issue related to delivery types during Goods Issue.

Process Overview:

  • Split valuation is activated for the material.

  • A Purchase Order was created for the NEW valuation type material, and the stock has been successfully uploaded.

  • The NEW valuation type material was issued to production.

  • During the production process, the material got damaged, and we now need to issue the DAMAGED valuation type material back to the warehouse/store.

  • A maintenance plan order was created using IW31.

Issue Faced:

When attempting to perform a Goods Issue for the order, the system displays the following error

"Different delivery types DIG DOG not possible in one document"

Request for Support:

Could you please advise:

  • If there is any mistake in the process mentioned above?

  • What is the correct way to issue damaged material from production to warehouse/store under the DAMAGED valuation type?

  • Are there any specific configurations (e.g., movement type to delivery type mapping, valuation type handling in EWM) that need to be checked or updated to resolve this issue?

 

Thanks You

entry.title: Document Item text mandatory for scrapping in manage stock application
entry.content:
Document Item text to be mandatory for scrapping in "Manage stock" application, Highlighted in screenshot below,

we have made the field mandatory through configuration shown in screenshot below,

but this is mandatory field reflecting in MIGO (Post goods movement) Application but not in "Manage stock" application.

We need it to be applicable in "Manage stock" application, If any other configuration is missed in this case please highlight.

entry.title: I have a business requirement in SAP EWM
entry.content:
Scenario Recap:

  • 1 Outbound Delivery with 4 Line Items (Products).
  • Each line item is picked from 4 different storage types.
  • The first two products (from one warehouse order) must be picked first and placed in a temporary intermediate storage bin until the second warehouse order is in a locked status.
  • Remaining 2 products are then picked and brought to same intermediate storage bin.
  • Finally, all products are packed into one HU (Handling Unit).
  • HU is then moved to staging area.Could you please guide me on how we can achieve this requirement?
  • SAP Extended Warehouse Management

entry.title: Free text material log
entry.content:
Hello Everyone ;

We have material returned to the warehouse from closed jobs , material was intialy bought as free text purchase orders non stock and cannot be credited to stock . Disposition will require working with vendor and asset recovery for disposition or return . My questiion is this : Is there any SAP transaction (similar to IQS1) which allow us to log this material (PO number , description , quantity...) in the system till disposition happen ? Currentely we are using a spreadsheet .

Thank you

entry.title: Warehouse process not suitable for GR storage bin in delivery item, Error in the message HU
entry.content:
Hi Experts,

Could you please help me to sort out the issues?

 

 

 

 

 

Regards,

Ravi

entry.title: Whitescreen after logging in Public cloud with Zebra scanner (via Velocity)
entry.content:
Hi all,

I’m facing an issue when trying to connect to SAP Public Cloud using Velocity on a Zebra MC330K handheld scanner (Android 8).

After launching the Velocity session and entering login credentials, the screen turns completely white and doesn’t proceed. This issue cannot be debugged directly in Velocity.

Here’s what I’ve already checked:

  • The root cause seems to be an outdated Chromium WebView (version 67).

  • I tested with the standard Chromium browser deployed via Zebra StageNow/ADB (also version 67), and the issue persists.

  • The device is running with Zebra Enterprise Home Screen, so I have no direct access to standard Android settings or the Play Store to update Chromium.

Has anyone faced something similar?
Is there a recommended approach to update the Chromium WebView on these Zebra devices — or an alternative way to run SAP Fiori apps in such constrained environments? Could the solution be try to push Zebra enterprise browser to the scanner?

entry.title: Cycle Counting Error , Material found: old stock=0
entry.content:
Hi All,

 

I am facing issue while doing cycle cound Material found: old stock=0 in LI11n

entry.title: Missing MRP Type error while processing the IDoc for the MATMAS07 message type in EWM
entry.content:
Hi colleagues, 

 

Business Case: We have the Reduced Message Type /BYGL/EWMMATMAS. In Segment E1MARCM, the MRP view fields are deselected as we don’t need in EWM or to keep per SAP’s recommended fields in this segment. (Refer the screenshots for the segment fields at the last in this document).

Even after reducing the MRP fields, still the MRP Type Missing error is coming.

 

Thanks a lot. 

 

Best regards,,

Edward

entry.title: How to test a 3pl warehouse without the communication with the WMS
entry.content:
Hi team,

We are in an integration between s4 public and a WMS using CPI, all the scope item 1ZQ was completed and now the outgoing messages are being sent successfully but we can't get any response because the WMS needs to finish their configuration, I have done the same process in SAP ByD  and there there is workcenter call it "THIRD-PARTY LOGISTICS" to confirm inbound and outbound movements directly in SAP without the WMS.

Do you know if something similar exists in S4 Public Cloud, or how I can process GR/GI movements without the WMS in a 3PL Warehouse?

Thanks

Sergio BH

entry.title: Batch replication stuck in SMQ2
entry.content:
Hi Experts,

The following error occurs in the ERP system (S/4HANA), which is connected to a decentralized EWM system on S/4HANA (02/10/2024 FPS):

When I create a batch in the inbound delivery in the decentralized EWM system, the batch is replicated to the ERP system but sometimes gets stuck in SMQ2 with the error message: "Object does not exist."
Function module is /SPE/BATCH_SAVE_REPLICA.

This issue happens from time to time — most of the time, batch replication works fine. I am currently investigating the reason why the system occasionally throws this error.

entry.title: Apply note 3321845 in EWM 9.5
entry.content: Is it planned to apply the note 3321845 in EWM 9.5? Is there any chance to have the same functionality in EWM 9.5?

entry.title: AUTo TASK trigger based on QA UD
entry.content:
Hi SAP Team,

 

We are unable to determine Auto TASK Creation through the PPF based on Quality UD,

We have find out all cross process settings and  SAP EWM configurations, 

Kindly help to trigger AUTO task based on UD decisions 

 

Regards,



------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------
Learn more about the SAP Support user and program here.
